props.className: mx-auto max-w-3xl px-4 sm:px-6 py-12 md:py-16

children.text: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unworn, with tags attached and in original packaging.
To initiate a return, go to your account and select the order. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the item.
Sale items may have different return terms. Please check the product page for details.
